strengths: The section reads as a single focused idea.
Density is consistent across the sampled window (sparse).
weaknesses: The visual footprint is very narrow relative to the full scene.
Only one family is carrying the section (Tree).
designAdjustmentSuggestions: Decide whether this section should remain Tree-only or intentionally add a support family.

strengths: Active content is concentrated enough to make the lead target legible.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
Centroid motion indicates the active content is evolving, not frozen.
weaknesses: Scene spread is too tight; add restrained support targets before polishing detail.
Family balance is narrow; current output relies entirely on Tree.
revisionSuggestions: Broaden the active footprint with one secondary support family while preserving the lead target.
